# AppClipAdvancedExperience.Attributes

**Object**

The attributes that describe an Advanced App Clip Experiences resource.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipAdvancedExperience.Attributes
```

## Objects

- **AppClipAdvancedExperience.Attributes.Place**: The place information of an advanced App Clip experience.

## Objects

- **AppClipAdvancedExperience.Relationships**: The relationships of the Advanced App Clip Experiences resource you included in the request and those on which you can operate.
